description: SlideRoom is an application intake and review platform used to collect, manage, and evaluate submissions such as admissions, portfolios, and other applications. It also offers related data export and contact-management capabilities for organizations using the platform.
summary: slideroom.com exposes two documented REST APIs on api.slideroom.com—a current SlideRoom API V2 with an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and a legacy V1 API—and also publishes a separate Contacts API v1 on contacts-api.slideroom.com with discoverable Swagger docs but unclear auth.
